site.name: Mathieu Châles — Portfolio
site.description: Portfolio of Mathieu Châles, junior fullstack developer based in Paris. Career-switcher from woodworking, graduating from La Capsule. Looking for a full-time role or internship.

profile.bioIntro: Yesterday I was shaping wood. Today I write code.
profile.bioTagline: Always to build things that serve a purpose.
bioParagraphs: **Mechanical engineer** by training, I coordinated **science programmes** before switching careers through the **La Capsule** fullstack bootcamp (2026).
I code in **TypeScript** — **React / Next.js** on the web, **React Native** on mobile, **Node.js** on the server. Looking for a **full-time role or internship** in the **Paris area** (hybrid).

about.heading: About
about.quote: Every line of code is a seed planted toward a lasting user experience.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.subheading: A collection of tools forged project by project.

formation.heading: Education
formation.bootcampName: RNCP Level 6 — Fullstack Web & Mobile Developer
formation.description: Intensive fullstack web and mobile development training. Real projects, teamwork, professional pace.
formation.stack: React · Next.js · React Native · Node.js · Express · MongoDB · TypeScript · Git
formation.engineeringDescription: Multidisciplinary programme focused on mechanics, production and industrial logistics. Completed in work-study at Renault — optimising test protocols, coordinating between technical teams and cross-functional departments.

supervised.label: Supervised by me
supervised.tooltip: Project generated with Claude Code under my direct supervision.

alterago.title: AlterAgo
alterago.description: Daily gamification for seniors · challenges · progression system · 2-week MVP
alterago.roleDetail: Auth & onboarding end to end · Clerk · user profile · native camera · Cloudinary
alterago.modalDescription:
A mobile gamification app designed to help seniors stay motivated through daily challenges and a progression system. MVP project validating the RNCP Level 6 fullstack degree, built as a team of 3 in 2 weeks.

As tech lead, I owned the full authentication and onboarding flow: Clerk integration (sign-up, login, password reset), user profile creation with native camera access, and avatar storage on Cloudinary via the backend API.

picswipe.title: PicSwipe
picswipe.description: Sort Android gallery by swipe · keep or delete with a gesture · smooth animations · haptic feedback · solo project
picswipe.modalDescription: An Android app to sort your photo gallery at the speed of thought — swipe right to keep, left to delete. Solo project built from scratch: native gallery access with permission handling, smooth animations via Reanimated 4 and Gesture Handler, global state with Zustand, session persistence with AsyncStorage, and haptic feedback for a polished tactile feel. Photos load progressively by month, with a review screen to confirm deletions before permanently freeing storage.

drg-dashboard.title: DRG Dashboard
drg-dashboard.description: Reverse engineering · GVAS / UE4 binary saves · Python parser from scratch · player stats · web dashboard
drg-dashboard.modalDescription: A fullstack project built around reverse engineering: parsing the binary save files (GVAS / Unreal Engine 4 format) of Deep Rock Galactic to extract player statistics and display them in a web dashboard. The core is a Python parser written from scratch, decoding an undocumented binary format structure by structure — like building a translator for a language with no dictionary.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.pitch: I'm looking for a full-time role or an internship in the Paris area (hybrid). If you have a junior position, a mission, or just want to chat about a project — drop me a line.
